title: Sculk XP Bar
description: Gives the XP Bar a dark, sculk-like theme
body: # Description Gives the XP Bar a sculk texture. Sculk is used to show the empty region of the bar, while a blue color is used to show the filled region. This bar is unique, because the filled part is darker than the empty part. # Versions Supports Java 1.20.2 - 26.1. # Compatibility Incompatible with XP Bar packs and some GUI packs. # Want more XP Bar packs? ![Animated XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a086bb57eda1d0a5d98e5ac3d54249187aaf7d34.gif) ![Lava XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7274d284c329dbe9542f650566558a56273cb15f.gif) ![Stone Brick XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1166a7d73761f469c0d532521679079c9343601f.png) ![Sculk XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bb4c39944af28ed79efa18881f60bcf3b9000f2.gif)
